source_text: unless you say otherwise I will be silent
expected_text: Oven et do hyuyen, at dolo.

source_text: you do not work at home
expected_text: Et voy yexe be tam.

source_text: we would be going home, but we would be happy here
expected_text: Yat peyu tam, oy yat su iva him.

source_text: we know that he or she will come and we will be happy
expected_text: Yat te van it upo ay yat so iva.

source_text: even if I disagree, you will support me
expected_text: Gey ven at yontexe, et bolo at.

source_text: before we leave, say hi
expected_text: Du hay ja van yat pio.

source_text: this teacher is good, but that student is bad
expected_text: Hia tuxut se fia, oy hua tixut se fua.

source_text: she played but lost, and he tried but lost
expected_text: Iyt eka oy oka, ay wit yeka oy oka.

source_text: this is a good thing and that is mine
expected_text: His se fis ay huas se atas.

source_text: the man left for no reason, but someone else won
expected_text: Ha tob pia hyosav, oy hyut aka.
